wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Orbitron:wght@400;700;900&display=swap'); #mg-wprm-wrap,#mg-wprm-wrap *{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap{background:#020617!important;} #wprmenu_bar{background:#090d16!important;border-bottom:1px solid #00ffff!important;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,255,.25)!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a{letter-spacing:.1em;padding:15px 24px!important;border-left:2px solid transparent;color:#d946ef!important;text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(217,70,239,.5);transition:all .2s;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover,#mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li.current-menu-item>a{border-left-color:#00ffff!important;color:#00ffff!important;text-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(0,255,255,.8)!important;background:rgba(0,255,255,.05)!important;} #wprmenu_menu_ul li{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(217,70,239,.12)!important;} .cyber-header{background:#090d16;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,255,255,.2);padding:22px 24px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;} .cyber-header::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#d946ef,#00ffff,#d946ef);} .cyber-header h4{color:#00ffff;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;margin:8px 0 2px;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(0,255,255,.6);} .cyber-header span.sub{color:#d946ef;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.15em;text-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(217,70,239,.5);display:block;} .cyber-tag{display:inline-block;padding:2px 8px;background:rgba(0,255,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(0,255,255,.3);border-radius:3px;font-size:9px;color:#00ffff;margin-top:8px;letter-spacing:.1em;} .wpr_social_icons{padding:14px 24px;border-top:1px solid rgba(0,255,255,.15);display:flex;gap:10px;} .wpr_social_icons a{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:34px;height:34px;border:1px solid rgba(0,255,255,.3);transition:all .2s;} .wpr_social_icons a:hover{border-color:#00ffff;background:rgba(0,255,255,.1);}
content_before_menu_element:
Neural Gateway

SYSTEM ONLINE
ACCESS_LVL: ADMIN
